creator: sylvain@sylvaingarrigues.com
text:
(In reply to Sean Bruno from comment #10)

OK, I have removed the CPUTYPE?=cortex-a7 from my make.conf, rebuilt the jail and now all ports build fine.

Too bad we can't build CPU-optimized ports then. So I think I should close the bug now, I don't have much choice apart from (if I understand well) wait for QEMU to support the cortex-a7 cpu.
